## Testing

- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint`)

## Design System Compliance (if UI change)

- [ ] Grayscale palette only (no chromatic colors)
- [ ] Border radius: 12px (containers) or 9999px (interactive)
- [ ] Zero shadows
- [ ] Font weight 400 or 500 only
- [ ] Read [DESIGN.md](../../DESIGN.md)

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] No changes to auth middleware without review
- [ ] No weakening of input sanitization
- [ ] No raw SQL queries
